    1. accept(A, B, C)

Interface WmiQueryHandlerFFM.TriConsumer<A,B,C>

Type Parameters:
A - the first parameter type
B - the second parameter type
C - the third parameter type
Enclosing class:
WmiQueryHandlerFFM
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public static interface WmiQueryHandlerFFM.TriConsumer<A,B,C>
Functional interface for processing WMI rows with three parameters.
